a11yAnnounceUiHint: Tells the screen reader when you open lessons, Sage, or other panels.
a11yDesktopPlatformNote: Desktop app: everything above plus high-quality local voice, Sage microphone, and Sage reply read-aloud (download only after you accept).
a11yPiperDownloadBanner: Turn on “Enhanced Piper voice” below to download a local voice (~20 MB) after you accept.
a11yPiperLocaleHint: Piper voice language (also used for Sage replies).
a11yPiperVoiceHint: Higher-quality neural voice (~20 MB download, once per language). If off, lessons and labels use system speech.
a11yPrefsIntro: Works in the browser and in the desktop app. On the web, options use system speech; on desktop you can enable local voice and the Sage microphone.
a11yReadLessonsHint: Speaks each section aloud as you move through a lesson.
a11yReadUiHint: Uses your browser or OS voice for short toolbar and tour labels.
a11ySageAutoSpeakHint: Also toggled from the speaker button in Sage chat.
a11ySageVoiceNote: Sage microphone and local voice need the desktop app. Lesson read-aloud also works in the browser with system speech.
a11yWebPlatformNote: Browser: lesson read-aloud, tour steps, and UI labels via system speech; screen-reader announcements. No Sage microphone.
a11yWebVoiceNote: In the browser, read-aloud uses system speech (you may need to click the page once first). Sage microphone and local voice are desktop-only.
addCurriculumLangBody: Choose a preset language. The folder structure is copied from the language you are editing now; translate titles and lessons afterward.
addCurriculumLangDone: Language added. Switch languages with the dropdown and translate content in the graph.
addCurriculumLangExists: That language is already in this tree.
addCurriculumLangInvalid: Choose a language from the list.
addCurriculumLangNoTree: This tree has no language data to copy from.
addCurriculumLangProposerBlocked: Suggest-only role can’t add languages. Ask the tree owner for Editor access.
arboritoSupportNotAccepting: Arborito does not accept financial support yet; this button is informational only.
confirmCloseGame: Are you sure you want to exit the game? Any unsaved progress will be lost.
defaultLessonContent: Write the lesson content here. Use the side panel to add sections and organize the syllabus.
deleteTreeConfirm: Delete this tree and all its content?
errorNoContent: No valid content found in this tree.
lessonSectionTitleOnly: This entry is only the lesson title. Continue with “{next}” or pick a topic in the syllabus.
metaphorText: Like a tree, knowledge is nourished by the community (roots) to expand its branches and offer leaves of wisdom (lessons) to anyone who wishes to explore them.
noTreesLead: Add a public or private tree, or plant a new local garden to start exploring.
pdfDisclaimerText:
This document was automatically generated by Arborito, a decentralized knowledge explorer.
Tree: {treeName}
Author: {author}
Source: {source}

The content, text, images, and intellectual property contained herein belong exclusively to the authors and maintainers of the source listed. Arborito (Treesys) acts solely as a visualization engine and assumes no responsibility for the accuracy, legality, copyright status, or safety of the material presented in this document. Users are responsible for verifying the source of the information.
pdfPopupBlocked: Pop-up blocked. Allow pop-ups for PDF generation.
privateTreesLocalMissing: Could not find that local tree on this device.
privateTreesOnlyLocalSource: Only a local tree can be privately synced. Open one from My trees first.
privateTreesPublishCta: Sync encrypted draft to your account (other devices)
privateTreesPublishedOk: Draft synced to your account (still private).
privateTreesStopSync: Stop syncing this tree to your account
privateTreesStopSyncBody: Other devices you sign in on will no longer see this tree. The local copy on this device stays.
saveFailedLocal: Local save failed. Node not found.
sourceManagerDesc: Your branches, playlists and courses from the network.
treeLoadSlowHint: Still loading tree from the network…
